author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Community Week is Next Week!

Community Week kicks off next week! 

Attend every event during the week long celebration and obtain an exclusive and rare Atlas Brew badge. (Attendance of the events will be verified using Zealy. Secret passwords will be given out during events that will be redeemable for 12 hours.)

 Learn more about the Star Atlas Community Week: https://medium.com/star-atlas/star-atlas-community-week-a-galactic-celebration-cd0634b6c3fc
